summary: Excellent 1985 soundboard recording that sounds cleaner and more balanced than the usual Charlie Miller source.
review: The reviewer praises this SBD as a rare clean‑sounding source from an era known for spotty tapes, noting less tinny instrument levels and a well‑balanced mix. No specific musical comments are made, but the high rating reflects strong enthusiasm for the audio quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review is available; it is highly positive about the recording quality while offering no insight on performance, so rating leans toward strong recording but uncertain show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Cleaner than typical Charlie Miller SBD, less tinny, more balanced instrument levels; considered a treat for an otherwise spotty 1985 tape era.
